cause_analysis.narrative: The Nail & Body Shop | Waxing & Eyelash Extensions churned on 2026-04-01 after 308 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-06 (sms) — first complaint keyword: "problem". Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-01-06 via sms. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
